issues.description: Second PowerBoost action in first effect should be conditional on Life ≤ 2, not separate. Both boosts target the same card and should be in one effect with proper conditional logic.

Second effect (trigger: Trigger) is spurious and incorrect. There is no separate trigger condition for the additional +2000 power—it is conditional within the same Counter effect (if Life ≤ 2). This effect should be removed.
Amount should be +2000, not +1000. The card gains an additional +2000 power (not +1000).
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect for a battle effect. Should be 'EndOfBattle' or similar.
